author: @Shanjaq
text: This video was my introduction to Robert's channel, I was linked from the old EnergeticForum where we discussed novel electric motors and overunity devices.  the audio from his old mic was atrocious but there was something charming about hearing every thump/creak/slide noise over his voice from every object in the room he was recording.  o7 Robert, you are missed.

author: @karlfimm
text: You might want to mention the most dangerous part in the machine - the beryllium oxide in the magnetron insulators.

author: @asuscristo
text: i used junked microwave oven parts to help build the high voltage frequency matching hho generator for my car. thank you for your service to us out here in the bushes. a small select group is very grateful. supermuble has the plans for the meissner circuit that does the freq matching. Cheers Bob.
